title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket Holdings Services - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Nature's Basket Holdings Services - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nature's Basket Holdings Services family as a Senior Software Engineer in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
